title: Playing Cards (Red Back)
description: Custom Playing Card Models in Vanilla (Red Back)
body:
A simple playing card resource pack for minecraft. (Red Back)

The cards are double sided and have a red pattern on the back

![Cards on wall and held in hands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0550f271ec390e4d281f2b52e7e88c570e5e5614.png)

Use the following command in a command block to obtain a pack of cards


```
/give @p bundle[bundle_contents=[{id:"minecraft:paper",count:1,components:{"minecraft:item_model":"playingcards:ace_clubs","minecraft:item_name":'"♣ Ace of Clubs ♣"'}},{id:"minecraft:paper",count:1,components:{"minecraft:item_model":"playingcards:2_clubs","minecraft:item_name":'"♣ 2 of Clubs
```
